item.title: How I built this site
item.description: A quick tour through the technologies and approaches I used to build my site.

item.title: New Blog, Who Dis?
item.description: Welcome to the first post on my new blog!

item.title: The Well Grounded Java Developer 2nd Edition Has Been Published
item.description: A big announcement today - the 2nd Edition of my very first book, "The Well-Grounded Java Developer" has been published.

item.title: Advice For Young Developers
item.description: This post collects some of my thoughts about what skills a good entry-level developer needs, and the transition into being a professional software developer.
